title: Germany Heatwave MELTED my Ice Cream in Lisbon! #shorts
summary: A YouTube shorts post describes extreme heat affecting German and Portuguese cities, with ice cream melting as an illustrative detail. The post attributes the intensified conditions to the urban heat island effect and climate change.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof documents extreme heat across German and Portuguese cities, using melting ice cream as an illustrative detail. It attributes the intensified conditions to the urban heat island effect and climate change. The takeaway is that dense built environments amplify temperatures, and that broader warming trends compound the effect.
